data.summary: [Material Fusion Update Gift] A new crafting mode called 'Material Fusion' has been updated, Sensei!
data.body:
[Material Fusion Update Gift]

A new crafting mode called 'Material Fusion' has been updated, Sensei! 
Please check your mailbox for the Fusion Keystone gift from Schale!
(Available until 10/11/2022 14:59 PM.(UTC))
